name: listPeerPolicies
invariants: output.ok === false || (output.result.counts && typeof output.result.counts.allow === 'number' && typeof output.result.counts.block === 'number' && typeof output.result.counts.pending === 'number')
_note: federation.listPeerPolicies (LENS_ACTIONS, not MACROS) lists the caller's per-user allow/block/pending defederation policies from globalThis._concordSTATE.federation.access keyed by actor.userId. Counts are over the full set; the optional filter narrows entries only. Returns ok:true with empty entries + zeroed counts for an actor with no policies — never no_db (pure in-memory, per-user isolated).
